query:
SELECT 
  sport,
  gameDate,
  COUNT(*) as total_games,
  SUM(CASE WHEN spreadAwayBetsPct IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_splits,
  SUM(CASE WHEN spreadAwayBetsPct IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_splits,
  SUM(CASE WHEN publishedToFeed = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as published
FROM games
WHERE gameDate IN ('2026-03-30', '2026-03-31')
  AND sport IN ('MLB', 'NHL', 'NBA', 'NCAAM')
GROUP BY sport, gameDate
ORDER BY gameDate, sport;

  SUM(CASE WHEN spreadAwayBetsPct IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_splits,
  SUM(CASE WHEN publishedToFeed = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as published
FROM games
